---
name: Pull Request
about: Submit a change to this project
title: ''
labels: ''
assignees: ''
---

**What does this PR do?**
A clear description of the change and why it's needed.

**Related issue**
Link to the issue this PR resolves (if any).

**Type of change**
- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New feature
- [ ] Documentation update
- [ ] Refactoring (no functional change)
- [ ] CI / tooling

**Checklist**
- [ ] I have run all tests and they pass (`pytest tests/ -v`)
- [ ] I have added tests for any new functionality
- [ ] I have updated documentation as needed
- [ ] My code follows the project's code style (black, isort, mypy)
- [ ] I have read the [CONTRIBUTING.md](CONTRIBUTING.md) guidelines

**Screenshots / output**
If applicable, add screenshots or terminal output to show the change in action.
